creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Hi!

I'd still like to maintain sysutils/ansible1, but let's bump the deprecation date up. The reason is, I have to be mindful of it when updating sysutils/ansible and a couple of times it required changes to both ports (it's a slave).

I'm okay with axing sysutils/ansible1 once nothing else depends on it.
